summary: Iteration 22: Teleprompter Fix & Build Stamp verification. All 6 backend API regression tests passed (100%). All frontend code changes verified through static analysis (Expo React Native app not browser-renderable).
seed_data_creation: Test scripts created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teleprompter fix verified - now calls fetchScript() when script not in store. Build stamp shows 'ScriptM8 v1.1.0 (1041)'. Backend APIs at https://save-script-verify.preview.emergentagent.com all functional. Expo React Native app (not browser-testable).

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_1_fetchScript_called.code: const { scripts, fetchScript } = useScriptStore(); ... useEffect with fetchScript(params.scriptId)
TELEPROMPTER_FIX_1_fetchScript_called.note: fetchScript is properly imported and called when script not in store

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_2_loading_state.code: const [scriptLoading, setScriptLoading] = useState(!script); ... 'Loading script...' with ActivityIndicator
TELEPROMPTER_FIX_2_loading_state.note: scriptLoading initialized to !script (true when script not in store), shows loading UI

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_3_error_state.code: const [scriptError, setScriptError] = useState<string | null>(null); ... 'Unable to load script for teleprompter'
TELEPROMPTER_FIX_3_error_state.note: Shows error message with 'Go Back' button using router.back()

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_4_empty_content_state.note: Shows empty content message with 'Go Back' button

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_5_gates_before_permissi.note: Script loading/error/empty gates (112-162) come BEFORE camera permission checks (458-496)

TELEPROMPTER_FIX_6_go_back_button.note: Error states have 'Go Back' button using router.back()

BUILD_STAMP_2_version_display.note: Shows 'ScriptM8 v1.1.0 (1041)' at bottom of ScrollView

BUILD_STAMP_3_style.code: buildStamp: { textAlign: 'center', color: '#4b5563', fontSize: 11, marginTop: 24, marginBottom: 16 }

backend_regression_tests.description: POST /api/scripts creates script with correct structure
Scripts have correct lines structure for teleprompter

root_cause_analysis.problem: Teleprompter showed blank screen because it looked up script from scripts[] in store via scripts.find() but NEVER called fetchScript()
root_cause_analysis.cause: If script wasn't preloaded, it was undefined → empty lines → blank camera overlay
root_cause_analysis.solution: teleprompter.tsx now calls fetchScript(scriptId) when script not in store, with loading/error/empty state gates before camera/permissions
root_cause_analysis.verification: Code analysis confirms fetchScript call in useEffect, proper state initialization, and error handling gates
